denial_letter_text:
NOTICE OF ADVERSE BENEFIT DETERMINATION

Date of Notice: 01/30/2026
Cigna Open Access Plus (employer-sponsored group health plan)
Member ID: W102906273          Group #: GRP-1367
Authorization / Reference #: PA-2026-154300
Claim #: CLM-2026-207452
Date of Service (requested): 01/10/2026
Treating provider (as submitted): Harborview Clinical Partners

Dear Member,

This document is notice of an adverse benefit determination. We received your provider's prior authorization request on 01/12/2026 for Scrotal ultrasound with Doppler related to Scrotal pain, rule out torsion vs epididymitis (N50.9). After clinical review, we are unable to approve this request.

CASE SUMMARY
Service requested: Scrotal ultrasound with Doppler
Diagnosis (as submitted): Scrotal pain, rule out torsion vs epididymitis (N50.9)
Denial code: CO-197 — Precertification/authorization absent — service requires prior approval before the date of service.
Clinical policy applied:
Clinical criteria applied: InterQual criteria (2018) and/or older MCG modules (superseded guideline reference). Coverage Policy 107 under Cigna Medical Coverage Policy (CPG) and Milliman Care Guidelines (MCG)

EXPLANATION OF DECISION
This determination is based on a plan exclusion. State coverage mandates do not alter the terms of this plan for this determination.
Our review applied the criteria in Coverage Policy 107 and your plan's Summary Plan Description (SPD), Section 4 — Medical Benefits and Utilization Management. The documentation submitted does not demonstrate that the service is medically necessary for this member at this time. Continuation of Scrotal ultrasound with Doppler requires an active prior authorization; the prior auth lapsed. A new authorization must be submitted.

Diagnosis and procedure codes used in this determination are available upon request, as required by applicable federal standards.

If your provider wishes to discuss this determination, they may contact our physician review line. Any discussion must occur within the timeframe described in your plan materials.

YOUR RIGHT TO INFORMATION
You may request a copy of your claim file and the clinical criteria we used in this determination. Submit your request to the address on this notice or through your plan's member portal.

Your treating physician may request a peer-to-peer discussion with a Cigna medical director regarding this determination.

APPEAL RIGHTS
You have the right to appeal this determination. If this denial is upheld after internal review, you may have the right to request an independent external review of our decision at no cost to you, subject to applicable federal and state requirements. To file a standard appeal, send a written request and supporting medical records within 180 days of the date of this notice. Include your member identification number (W102906273) and reference PA-2026-154300. 

Please note that benefits are subject to all terms, exclusions, and limitations of your group health plan document. This letter constitutes the formal adverse determination for the service identified above.

Sincerely,

Cigna Health Care Management
Medical Review Unit
clinical_context: The 34-year-old member has Scrotal pain, rule out torsion vs epididymitis (N50.9). He has been treated under commercial coverage with Scrotal ultrasound with Doppler recommended as the next appropriate step. Acute onset pain 8 hours; UA negative; cremasteric reflex present. The prior-authorization packet included dated clinic notes, medication trials, and objective findings supporting medical necessity. The denial rationale does not reference those submissions. Treating clinicians document ongoing functional impairment and recommend proceeding without further delay when benefit-plan criteria have been met based on the record on file.
